# MOE Brand Governance

Nutze diesen Skill fuer Brand-Regeln, Brand-Review, Templates und Brand-Voice.

## Adapter-Quellen

- `.claude/plugins/moe-brand/skills/brand-check/SKILL.md`
- `.claude/plugins/moe-brand/skills/text-voice/SKILL.md`
- `.claude/plugins/moe-brand/skills/social-media/SKILL.md`
- weitere Brand-Skills aus `.claude/plugins/moe-brand/skills/*/SKILL.md`
